title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at South Indian Bank South Asia Partners
company: South Indian Bank South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at South Indian Bank South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Join the South Indian Bank South Asia Partners family as a Financial Analyst in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About South Indian Bank South Asia Partners:
South Indian Bank South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with South Indian Bank South Asia Partners!
